event: Tesla halts Bitcoin payments (Musk citing energy)
description: Musk announces Tesla suspends BTC for vehicle purchases; BTC drops ~15% intraday.
BTC drops to ~$30k from $58k earlier in May amid leverage flush and China crackdown.

event: China escalates mining and trading crackdown
description: State Council Financial Stability Committee vows to crack down on Bitcoin mining and trading.
Legislative Assembly approves Bitcoin Law making BTC legal tender.

event: Sichuan mining ban triggers Great Hashrate Migration
description: Local order forces Sichuan miners offline; global hashrate falls ~50% from May ATH.

event: El Salvador Bitcoin Law takes effect
description: BTC officially becomes legal tender; government buys initial 400 BTC.

event: People's Bank of China declares all crypto transactions illegal
description: PBoC joint notice criminalizes domestic crypto-related financial services.

event: ProShares BITO (first US BTC futures ETF) lists
description: BITO begins trading on NYSE Arca; largest ETF debut by 2-day volume at the time.
Cycle peak at $69,044 on Bitstamp.

event: Taproot soft fork activates at block 709,632
description: Taproot/Schnorr signatures live; first major BTC upgrade since SegWit.

event: Bank of Russia proposes crypto ban
description: Central bank report calls for prohibition of crypto issuance, mining, and trading.

event: US Executive Order 14067 on digital assets
description: Biden EO orders whole-of-government approach to crypto; positive market reaction.

event: Fed first rate hike, ending ZIRP
description: FOMC raises target by 25bps to 0.25-0.50%; start of fastest hiking cycle in 40 years.
UST loses dollar peg; LUNA crashes from $80 toward zero over the week.
Celsius freezes withdrawals citing 'extreme market conditions'; files Ch11 July 13.

event: Three Arrows Capital ordered into liquidation
description: BVI court orders 3AC liquidation after Voyager loan default.
Beacon chain merge; not BTC but shifts narrative around BTC as last major PoW.

event: Binance LOI to acquire FTX (then withdrawn)
description: CZ tweets non-binding LOI; bank run intensifies; deal pulled Nov 9.
FTX, Alameda, ~130 entities file; SBF resigns. BTC under $16k.
Lender cites FTX contagion exposure.
Recovery from cycle low ~$15,500 (Nov 21, 2022).
Casey Rodarmor inscribes first ordinal; sparks BTC NFTs/BRC-20 wave.
SVB closed by FDIC; USDC briefly depegs; BTC rallies on banking-crisis narrative.

event: Signature Bank closed; Fed BTFP launched
description: Signature seized; Fed announces Bank Term Funding Program backstop.
SEC files 13 charges against Binance and CZ.
SEC charges Coinbase with operating unregistered exchange.

event: BlackRock files iShares Bitcoin Trust S-1
description: First Tier-1 asset manager files spot BTC ETF application.

event: Grayscale wins vs SEC at DC Circuit
description: Court vacates SEC denial of GBTC conversion; major catalyst for spot ETF path.
Spurious tweet briefly pumps BTC ~10%; signals market positioning for ETF.
SEC issues 19b-4 approval orders for IBIT, FBTC, ARKB, BITB, BTCO, EZBC, BRRR, HODL, BTCW, DEFI, GBTC conversion.
IBIT, FBTC, others list on Cboe/Nasdaq/NYSE Arca; $4.6B day-1 volume.
Spot ETF inflows drive cycle to new ATH before halving (first time in BTC history).
Subsidy 6.25 -> 3.125 BTC; Runes protocol activates same block.

event: Runes protocol launches at halving block
description: Casey Rodarmor's Runes go live; spikes fees to all-time high.

event: US House passes FIT21 crypto market structure
description: H.R. 4763 passes 279-136 with bipartisan support.
Trustee starts BTC/BCH repayments to ~127,000 creditors over Jul-Oct.
Yen carry-trade unwind + recession fears; BTC drops to ~$49k intraday.

event: Fed cuts 50bps; first cut of cycle
description: FOMC starts easing cycle; target to 4.75-5.00%.
Crypto-friendly admin priced in; BTC rallies through $75k overnight.
First time above six figures.

event: Fed hawkish cut; BTC sells off
description: 25bps cut + hawkish 2025 dot plot; BTC drops from ~$108k.
Trump sworn in; signs EO 14178 (Jan 23) directing crypto-friendly policy framework.
Acting Chair Uyeda rescinds custody accounting bulletin; banks can custody crypto.
Largest crypto exchange hack ever; Lazarus Group attributed.

event: Trump EO 14233 — US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
description: Establishes reserve from seized BTC; no new purchases mandated.
Trump announces sweeping reciprocal tariffs; BTC drops ~7% on risk-off.
New all-time high amid sustained ETF inflows and reserve narrative.
H.R. 3633 passed the House 294-134 and continued to Senate action.
